chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1129 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4462/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4463/2022 (I Rule 10 CPC) 4. For hearing of CMA No.4383/2022 (XXXIX Rule 1 & 2 CPC) 5. For hearing of CMA No.4384/2022 (I Rule 10 CPC) 6. For hearing of CMA No.4212/2022 (S/A) 7. For hearing of main case 27-09-2022 Petitioner Abdul Hafeez, present in person. Mr. Hamid Ali Memon, Advocate for the intervenor. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Abdul Waheed Indhar, Director School Education (Elementary, Secondary & Higher Secondary), Sukkur Region..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Since after filing of instant petition, the impugned transfer order of the petitioner has been withdrawn and now the petitioner has been posted as Junior Clerk at office of the District Education Officer, Shikarpur vide order dated 16-09-2022, issued by Secretary, Schools Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, and the petitioner has joined his duties, instant petition has served its purpose; hence, the same stands disposed of along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
